# Archie My Kuya

Archie My Kuya is a science education website for Archie, a biology teacher interested in AI and welding. The website shares biology lessons, lab ideas, science explanations, AI learning experiments, welding-related applied science, and community questions.

## Main topics

- Biology education
- Cell biology
- Ecology
- Lab skills
- Science teaching
- AI for teachers and students
- Welding as applied science
- STEM learning

## Site purpose

The purpose of this site is to make science easier to understand, more visual, and more accessible for students, parents, teachers, and lifelong learners around the world.

## Content editing

Editable content is stored in `assets/content.js`. The visual layout is in `index.html` and `styles.css`.
